---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

The easiest way to reach me is by email at [brian.libgober@northwestern.edu](mailto:brian.libgober@northwestern.edu).

You can also find current links here:

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=gR0rYp8AAAAJ&inst=13592255891762573016)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/libgober)
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/blibgober.bsky.social)
- [CV](https://github.com/libgober/cv/blob/main/cv.pdf)
